name: Rem: The Best Alarm Clock
description:
Rem's here to wake her Master up. You.

2102 - 2032 Tokens.

Very lore accurate.

You basically replace Roswaal.

Ram bot probably tomorrow. Definitely this week.

Used the wiki as a source as usual. Thanks to @Aleatorio34 for the request. Scenario inspired by @Zodchi's Ram bot. Template by @TutuTheKiller. Art By "葉月かなめ" (roughly translates as Kaname Hazuki)

Feel free to use my World Lore section in your own bots, but please tag me (I'd appreciate leaving a review about it if you do). And yes, I know, I'm really bad at opening messages. Please suggest any alt scenarios or changes in the reviews.

Yes, Rem falls under 'Demi-Human' in RE:Zero lore.

And again, no, you can't have the Satella bot.
creator: RealKami
